failures: leverage_accuracy: Competing number cited ($2400) does not match any real quote from OTHER QUOTES.
fee_pushback: Agent did not push on specific terms or fees; only mentioned them without negotiation specifics.
price_movement_logging: Negotiated_total was incorrectly left as $1500 while the presented fee changes were not accurately reflected.
consistency_warnings: Counterparty stated $1,200 on the call (below the $1,500 original), but the outcome logs 'held_firm' with negotiated_total=1500 - a concrete offer may have been left unresolved. See closer_agent.md: 'Never let a concrete number go unlogged.'
